recommendations.title: Spell
recommendations.overview: A father survives a plane crash in rural Appalachia, but becomes suspicious of the elderly couple who take him in to nurse him back to health with the ancient remedies.

recommendations.title: Out of the Dark
recommendations.overview: A couple and their daughter moves to Colombia to take over a family manufacturing plant, only to realize their new home is haunted.

recommendations.title: The Untamed
recommendations.overview: A meteorite deposits an alien monster with strange powers near the home of an unhappy couple.

recommendations.title: Cellar Door
recommendations.overview: Looking for a fresh start after a miscarriage, a couple find themselves being gifted the house of their dreams with one caveat - they can never open the cellar door. Whether they can live without knowing triggers shocking consequences.

recommendations.title: Baghban
recommendations.overview: After dedicating their whole life in upbringing their children, elderly couple Raj Malhotra and Pooja gets homeless. Instead of caring, their children treat them as a burden.

recommendations.title: Aftermath
recommendations.overview: Desperate to save their marriage, a young couple takes a deal to move into their dream home, but disturbing events reveal the house's troubled history.

recommendations.title: Mower Minions
recommendations.overview: The Minions need to raise $20 to purchase an as seen on TV banana blender. So they take up lawn mowing at an old folks home, with hilarious antics!

recommendations.title: Nosferatu the Vampyre
recommendations.overview: A real estate agent leaves behind his beautiful wife to go to Transylvania to visit the mysterious Count Dracula and formalize the purchase of a property in Wismar.

recommendations.title: Dashcam
recommendations.overview: At the start of the pandemic, an indulgent and self-deluded livestreaming improv musician abandons L.A. for London, steals her ex-bandmate's car, and makes the fateful decision to give a ride to an elderly woman who is not what she seems.

recommendations.title: Tales from the Darkside: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A young boy tells three stories of horror to distract a witch who plans to eat him.
